series_metadata.series_title: Environmental Project Files / NEPA (National Environmental Policy Act) Studies
series_metadata.series_description: All necessary files, reports, studies, correspondence, maps, photographs, etc. used in the decision making of the project. This series also includes: Special Studies (purpose and need reports, alternative analysis reports, conceptual alternative summaries, cumulative/secondary impact reports, modal/planning studies, environmental justice reports, traffic surveys/studies, etc.) as well as the NEPA environmental clearance document.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: electronic images permanently comply with federal statutes addressing records retention
